title: Lesson 66
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: a record for money or online access
words.example: I opened a bank account yesterday.
My dentist appointment is at three.

words.meaning: a formal request for a job, school, or service
words.example: She sent her application before the deadline.

words.meaning: a plan made before something happens
words.example: The travel arrangement includes a hotel.

words.meaning: a plan for how money will be spent

words.example: Read the contract before you sign it.

words.meaning: the latest time when work must be finished
words.example: The deadline for the essay is Friday.

words.meaning: money that a person or business receives
words.example: His income comes from two jobs.

words.meaning: a document that asks for payment
words.example: The company sent an invoice by email.

words.meaning: a paper or message proving payment
words.example: Keep the receipt after you buy the camera.
